headline: Is Zimmer Biomet Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Zimmer Biomet has lagged the broader S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain on the sidelines as they weigh the company's steady fundamentals against its modest growth outlook.
